title: The Magic Words
lesson: Kind words like "please" and "thank you" make people smile.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image into a cozy, sunny home kitchen, sitting at a wooden table. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible and a cheerful expression. In the background to the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} stands by the counter holding a plate of cookies, smiling. Warm morning light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

texts: You sat at the kitchen table. Grandma had a plate of warm cookies. Mmm, they smelled delicious!
You really, really wanted one, and you reached your hand toward the plate.
Then you remembered the magic word. "Please may I have a cookie?" you asked with a smile.
"Of course you may!" said Grandma, and she happily held out the plate.
You took a cookie and hugged it close. "Thank you, Grandma!" Her heart felt warm and glad.
You shared the cookies together, cosy and happy. Kind words made you both smile.
